body_txt: A Stereotype Flip of the "Angry Black Man" Stereotype , in which a white person ( generally a man ) feels that modern society has done a Persecution Flip and is now discriminatory against white people, with the culprits usually being minorities or other self-hating whites . The type first appeared in large numbers in the mid-1960s , when "affirmative action" hiring became an official policy of the United States federal government. This was quickly portrayed by detractors as permitting discrimination against white people and men to meet hiring quotas for women and minorities—with the unspoken implication that they are hiring inferior candidates . Over the decades, however, affirmative action has become less of a political flashpoint, with some programs being discontinued, struck down by courts, or reworked to focus on non-racial factors like income. As a result, the modern Angry White Man usually points to more oblique forms of ostensible discrimination. Many complaints by the Angry White Man are directed at modern pop culture, fully believing that New Media Are Evil . He points to things like white people being Acceptable Targets for comedy and negative stereotyping , and depictions of women and non-whites in media as Flawless Tokens , as proof of the media's "politically correct agenda" . He also rails against what he claims to be whitewashed (or nonwhitewashed, as it were) history as an attempt to indoctrinate White Guilt in classrooms. But where he sees proof that Everything Is Racist , however, the rest of society sees him just Feeling Oppressed by Their Existence . Will most likely be Played for Laughs , but if not... watch out! Unsurprisingly, it is also extremely common for these characters to suffer from a bad case of Moral Myopia . They will decry any (real or imagined) injustice that they and other white people may face, no matter how minor, but won't so much as bat an eye when anyone from another group, especially a historically marginalized one, faces a similar or worse situation. In fact, there's a good chance they might even support or take part in marginalizing said group, all while still blaming them for their predicament . Compare Blaming "The Man" , Evil Colonialist , Politically Incorrect Villain , and Sub-Par Supremacist . Get extreme and militant enough, and you end up in the domain of the Right-Wing Militia Fanatic , The Klan , and A Nazi by Any Other Name . Compare and contrast "Angry Black Man" Stereotype and Malcolm Xerox , which portray black men claiming Everything Is Racist . The Trope Codifier was probably Archie Bunker of All in the Family , though he's arguably an Unbuilt example, being a lot less angry than many of his successors. It should also be noted that the Angry White Man doesn't have to literally be a Caucasian male. The trope can apply to any character from a historically privileged group who is constantly railing against supposed discrimination against them. No Real Life Examples, Please! noreallife
